final_prompt.prompt:
Create a documentary-style editorial photograph for a 微博 news/trending post, horizontal wide format.

Style/medium: needs a photojournalistic, high-end mobile documentary aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be horizontal with generous negative space for text overlay; dramatic subject spread across wide frame
Subject: must include a bustling urban crowd with pedestrians in motion, city skyline at dusk with neon lights beginning to glow, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset light
Scene/backdrop: must include a city dusk skyline with neon signs lighting up, golden-hour reflections on glass towers, street-level pedestrian flow
Lighting/mood: needs a dramatic golden-hour-to-neon transition atmosphere with high contrast between warm sunset and cool neon — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction of warm amber sunset against cool neon blues and purples — exact ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a sharp, high-resolution documentary texture with crisp detail — exact grain and sheen are yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, bold primary headline, prominent position); "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary subtitle, smaller); "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (small watermark, bottom-right corner)
Constraints: must be strict 16:9 horizontal format; must preserve all three text elements at their respective hierarchy and positions
Avoid:
